Class BossController

java.lang.Object
scenes.boss.BossController
public class BossController extends Object
Controller for the sequential boss battle system. Manages turn state, player and enemy actions, skill cooldowns, and progression through the three boss encounters (Akaza → Kokushibo → Muzan).

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    BossController.ActionResult
    Represents the outcome of a player or enemy action for the view to react to.
    static enum 
    BossController.BattleState
    Represents the current phase of the turn-based battle.
    static final record 
    BossController.BossInfo
    Immutable data holder for a boss entry (name, monster instance, and theme colour).

    Constructors

    Description
    BossController(Player player)
    Creates a new BossController for the given player and initialises the first boss.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • BossController

      public BossController(Player player)
      Creates a new BossController for the given player and initialises the first boss.
      Parameters:
      player - the player entering the boss room

  • Method Details

    • doDefend

      public BossController.ActionResult doDefend()
      Performs the player's Defend action, doubling DEF for the enemy's next turn.
      Returns:
      BossController.ActionResult.ENEMY_TURN if successful, BossController.ActionResult.NONE if not the player's turn

    • loadBoss

      public void loadBoss(int index)
      Loads the boss at the given index and resets the battle log.
      Parameters:
      index - the boss index (0 = Akaza, 1 = Kokushibo, 2 = Muzan)

    • doPlayerAttack

      public BossController.ActionResult doPlayerAttack()
      Performs the player's normal attack against the current boss.
      Returns:
      the resulting BossController.ActionResult after the attack

    • doSkill

      public BossController.ActionResult doSkill(int idx)
      Activates the player skill at the given index if it is ready and it is the player's turn.
      Parameters:
      idx - the skill index (0=Kagura Dance, 1=Dead Calm, 2=Constant Flux, 3=Water Wheel)
      Returns:
      the resulting BossController.ActionResult, or BossController.ActionResult.NONE if the skill is on cooldown

    • usePotion

      public BossController.ActionResult usePotion(BattleMenuController.PotionEntry entry)
      Consumes the selected potion from the player's inventory.
      Parameters:
      entry - the potion entry selected from the heal menu
      Returns:
      BossController.ActionResult.ENEMY_TURN after consuming, or BossController.ActionResult.NONE if not the player's turn

    • doRestHeal

      public BossController.ActionResult doRestHeal()
      Performs the Rest action, recovering 10% of the player's max HP without using an item.
      Returns:
      BossController.ActionResult.ENEMY_TURN after resting, or BossController.ActionResult.NONE if not the player's turn

    • doEnemyTurn

      public BossController.ActionResult doEnemyTurn()
      Executes the enemy's turn: applies attack (with possible crit), berserk debuff, and shield wall.
      Returns:
      the resulting BossController.ActionResult after the enemy acts

    • advanceToNextBoss

      public void advanceToNextBoss()
      Advances the battle to the next boss if one exists. Resets the battle state to BossController.BattleState.PLAYER_TURN.

    • getPlayer

      public Player getPlayer()
      Returns:
      the player participating in the battle

    • getCurrentBoss

      public Monster getCurrentBoss()
      Returns:
      the currently active boss monster

    • getBossName

      public String getBossName()
      Returns:
      the display name of the current boss

    • getBossColor

      public javafx.scene.paint.Color getBossColor()
      Returns:
      the theme colour of the current boss

    • getBossIndex

      public int getBossIndex()
      Returns:
      the index of the current boss (0–2)

    • getState

      public BossController.BattleState getState()
      Returns:
      the current BossController.BattleState

    • getLog

      public List<String> getLog()
      Returns:
      the live battle log (up to 8 most-recent lines)

    • getLastEnemyActionMs

      public long getLastEnemyActionMs()
      Returns:
      the system-time (ms) when the enemy last acted

    • hasNextBoss

      public boolean hasNextBoss()
      Returns:
      true if there is another boss after the current one

    • getMenuCtrl

      public BattleMenuController getMenuCtrl()
      Returns:
      the BattleMenuController managing menus and cooldowns

    • isPendingAttackAnim

      public boolean isPendingAttackAnim()
      Returns:
      true if an attack animation should play this frame

    • isPendingBossShake

      public boolean isPendingBossShake()
      Returns:
      true if the boss shake animation should trigger

    • isPendingPlayerShake

      public boolean isPendingPlayerShake()
      Returns:
      true if the player shake animation should trigger

    • clearAttackAnimFlag

      public void clearAttackAnimFlag()
      Clears the pending attack animation flag after the view has consumed it.

    • clearBossShakeFlag

      public void clearBossShakeFlag()
      Clears the pending boss shake flag after the view has consumed it.

    • clearPlayerShakeFlag

      public void clearPlayerShakeFlag()
      Clears the pending player shake flag after the view has consumed it.
